role: Defines the core type definitions, data contracts, and configuration interfaces for the ArchSpine mirror system, including protocol types and view artifact schemas.
responsibility: Establishes the foundational data model and public API contracts for the ArchSpine infrastructure, enabling consistent representation of mirrored code units, dependency graphs, language metadata, synchronization manifests, rule documents, and view artifacts such as architecture diagrams and risk hotspot reports. Provides a stable import facade for external consumers through the protocol entry point.

children.role: Defines the core data contracts and configuration schema for the ArchSpine mirror system.
Public protocol facade module providing a stable entry point for importing all ArchSpine protocol types.
Type definition module establishing the contract for view artifacts in the ArchSpine view generation system.
